configuration.title: ShortestPath IDE Setup
configuration.completed: Whether the first-run setup has been completed.
configuration.pending: The configuration selected by the first-run setup before it is applied.
configuration.executableCleanupDelaySeco: Seconds to keep generated executables after they finish running. Set to 0 to delete immediately.
configuration.executableCleanupEnabled: Automatically delete generated executables after they finish running.
description: First-run competitive programming environment setup for ShortestPath IDE.
command.configure: ShortestPath IDE: Configure Competitive Programming Environment
command.configureCppSnippets: ShortestPath IDE: Configure C++ Code Snippets
